# React Hooks Patterns

## When to Activate
- Working with React functional components
- Need to manage local component state
- Handling side effects in components

## Key Patterns

### useState
```javascript
const [count, setCount] = useState(0)
```

### useEffect
```javascript
useEffect(() => {
  document.title = `Count: ${count}`
}, [count])
```

## Notes
useEffect runs after every render by default. Use the dependency array to control when it runs.
title: React Hooks Patterns
description: Practical patterns for using React hooks in functional components
